ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Sore Must Be the Storm
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After a heroic rescue lands her in the hospital, Mare awakes to the unshakable pain of losing a friend. Then, given a second chance by Chief Carter, Mare reevaluates old suspects, which leads to a shocking clue.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Sacrament

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Millie

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Hibiscus

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Get Millie Black
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Holborn

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Janet
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Not knowing whom to trust, Millie goes rogue to get to the bottom of the Somervilles' criminal enterprise before Holborn can interfere; when Janet makes an unexpected decision, Millie must take extreme measures to protect the ones she loves.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Get Millie Black
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Curtis
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In Kingston, Curtis faces the consequences of Millie's actions and must decide what matters most; an undercover Millie arrives back in London and must find and save Romeo before the mysterious "Lindo" can stop her.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: "Wuthering Heights"
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: This Little Piggy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Transcending Human Limitations
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rocket Science
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After David Sconce takes over his family's mortuary business, a local funeral director makes allegations about the crematorium.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: David expands the business as allegations of abuse mount; following his arrest, evidence is discovered in the death of a rival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Members of the Lamb family are convicted of various crimes, including fraud; while in prison, a murder charge is brought against David for the death of his competitor.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Witch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spring Awakening: Those You've Known
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The original cast and creative team of "Spring Awakening" reunite 15 years after the Tony-winning Broadway run for a concert to benefit The Actors Fund; participants include cast members Jonathan Groff, Lea Michele and Skylar Astin.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Atomic Blonde
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ne Zha 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Actor Christopher Reeve rises to stardom when he lands the role of Superman in the 1970s. When a horse-riding accident leaves him paralyzed in 1995, Reeve spends the rest of his life searching for a cure for spinal cord injuries.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Mom Jayne
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious

They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Greenland 2: Migration
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One South: Portrait of a Psych Unit
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part One
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Young adults in crisis arrive at One South and the doctors rush to evaluate, stabilize, and support them, with the goal of readying them to leave the unit with a practical out patient treatment plan; the patients have several group therapy sessions.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One Survivor Remembers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Family photos, film clips and interviews tell Gerda Weissmann's story of the Holocaust, in tribute to the millions who died during World War II.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lighthouse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: 1993. Niall se siente en un dilema cuando su madre le pide que mienta ante el tribunal sobre la violencia de Rubén. Rubén parece cambiar para mejor, por lo que la decisión le pesa enormemente.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Luego de triunfar dentro y fuera del aula, Greg motiva al equipo de hockey antes de un partido clave. Archie recibe comentarios sobre su libro. Katie concentra sus esfuerzos en conseguir la titularidad, lo que revela qué tan involucrados están sus padres en su vida.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: 1993. Niall se siente en un dilema cuando su madre le pide que mienta ante el tribunal sobre la violencia de Rubén. Rubén parece cambiar para mejor, por lo que la decisión le pesa enormemente.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Valerie intenta reparar el daño causado por la prensa negativa sobre la IA y salvar el trabajo de Mark en el reality show apareciendo en "Finance Dudes".

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Un grupo de colonos espaciales se enfrenta a la criatura más aterradora del universo en una nave espacial abandonada a la que han accedido para recuperar cámaras de criostasis, con las que piensan huir a un planeta lejano.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: A Rue le proponen un trato arriesgado que la sumerge aún más en el mundo de Alamo. Nate se enfrenta al ayuntamiento. Maddy le encarga a Cassie una misión que podría catapultar su nueva carrera. Lexi le pide a Jules que cree un cuadro original para LA Nights.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Diego Maradona
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El 5 de julio de 1984, Diego Maradona llegó a Nápoles luego de un pago récord. El futbolista más icónico del mundo y una de las ciudades más apasionadas y peligrosas de Europa conformaron una dupla ideal.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Las vidas de una estrella de la NBA, un policía corrupto, un dúo femenino de rap, unos punks adolescentes, unos neonazis y un cobrador de deudas se cruzarán inesperadamente en el Oakland de 1987, en California.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man

TNT.HD.us2.title: John Wick
TNT.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

TNT.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
TNT.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

TNT.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
TNT.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

TNT.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
TNT.HD.us2.description: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Black Hawk Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: In 1993, the U.S. sends special forces into Somalia to destabilize the government and bring food and humanitarian aid to the starving population. Using Black Hawk helicopters to lower the soldiers onto the ground, an unexpected attack by Somalian forces brings two of the helicopters down immediately. From there, the U.S. soldiers must struggle to regain their balance while enduring heavy gunfire.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo III
AMC.HD.us2.description: Reluctant one-man army Rambo goes into action against Soviet invaders in Afghanistan. Sought out in a Buddhist monastery retreat, Rambo declines his former commander's request for help to deliver missiles to the mujahideen, but when his superior is captured and imprisoned, the hulking hero brings out the big guns.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: Last Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam War veteran John Rambo tries to find some semblance of peace by raising horses on a ranch in Arizona. He's also developed a special familial bond with a woman named Maria and her teenage granddaughter Gabriela. But when a vicious Mexican cartel kidnaps Gabriela, Rambo crosses the border on a bloody and personal quest to rescue her and punish those responsible.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Book of Eli
AMC.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after war turned the world into a wasteland, a lone warrior named Eli marches across the ruined landscape, carrying hope for humanity's redemption. Only one other man understands the power of what Eli carries, and he is determined to take it for himself. Though Eli prefers peace, he must risk death to protect his precious cargo, to fulfill his destiny to help restore mankind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Legend
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert Neville, a scientist, is a survivor of a man-made plague that transforms humans into mutants. He wanders alone through New York City, calling out for other possible survivors and works on finding a cure for the plague using his own immune blood. Neville knows he is badly outnumbered and the odds are against him. The infected wait for him to make a mistake that will deliver Neville into their hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black
AMC.HD.us2.description: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black II
AMC.HD.us2.description: Kay and Jay reunite to provide our best line of defense against a seductress who levels the toughest challenge yet to the MIB's mission statement: protecting the earth from the scum of the universe. While investigating a routine crime, Jay uncovers a plot masterminded by Serleena, a Kylothian monster who disguises herself as a lingerie model. When Serleena takes the MIB building hostage, there is only one person Jay can turn to -- his former MIB partner.

He must now retrieve an endangered white bat from a village located in Africa. The sacred animal was offered up as a wedding dowry from the Wachootoo prince to the Wachati princess, and, if Ace can't track down the culprit behind the kidnapping in time, civil war will break out between the two rival tribes.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
AMC.HD.us2.description: When the dolphin mascot of Miami's NFL team is abducted, Ace Ventura, a zany private investigator who specializes in finding missing animals, looks into the case. Soon Miami Dolphins players are kidnapped too, including star player Dan Marino, making Ace's sleuth work even more pressing. Working with Dolphins representative Melissa Robinson, Ace closes in on the culprits, but not before many ridiculous misadventures.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deep Impact
AMC.HD.us2.description: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

Carmen preparó la celebración de la renovación de los votos matrimoniales de sus padres, pero el padre, en plena ceremonia, revela que todo ha sido una farsa y que no está dispuesto a seguir viviendo con alguien por la que no siente nada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pato salva a una señora de ser atropellada y entre ellas comienza una linda relación. Tratando de defender a su nueva amiga, la adolescente termina en el hospital y así se descubre la verdad sobre el lazo que las une.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Blanca denuncia a Pablo por golpearla, él va a la cárcel y ella se muda con sus hijos. Diez años después, Pablo intenta recuperar a su familia, pero su hijo se opone.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guillermo y Andrés enfrentan un reto que podría hacerlos acreedores de un automóvil. Daniel y Elizabeth necesitan dinero en efectivo para emprender un negocio de renta de videojuegos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor a lo Romeo y Julieta; Venganza del tigre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Henna y Miguel son incapacitados y quieren ser una familia independiente. Ivelis le exige compensación a Nicolás por publicar en las redes un video íntimo que la pone en ridículo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Artista natural
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Samuel y Chris son un dúo musical de niños, la mánager demanda a la mamá de uno de ellos porque no quiere firmar contrato con un show de televisión que les puede abrir las puertas del éxito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cupones malditos; Todo para vender
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique no soporta la obsesión de su esposa por los cupones de descuentos, exige terapia psicológica. Anulan el contrato porque se besaron durante el experimento en el que fingían ser hermanos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

Live: Premios Platino Xcaret 2026

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Adicción sin control; La próxima víctima
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Christian pide que Cecilia le dé una compensación porque se masturbó en su taxi y subió el video a la red. Está asustado porque su esposa es viuda de tres hombres que murieron sospechosamente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Crisis de opioides; El cartel de las ex
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yeny pide el divorcio porque su esposo, Héctor, se ha vuelto adicto a los medicamentos. Rodrigo saca a su hija de su país porque fue víctima de un complot de la madre con psicólogos corruptos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Manuel tuvo una relación legal con una menor de edad, pero lo denuncian por entrar a su email sin permiso. Demandan a una profesora por resaltar lo peor de su alumno durante el funeral.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El arracadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un joven regresa a casa con el cuerpo de su padre asesinado, su madre le hace jurar que se vengará del asesino y le da un pendiente al que apodan "Las arracadas", así comienza la cacería.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida es de ella
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diambú, reguetonero en ascenso, solicita una orden de alejamiento contra su esposa María, quien pone en riesgo su carrera musical con altercados por celos durante los conciertos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confié en ella y me robó
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan descubre que Fabiola toma un reloj y dinero de su pareja actual y se decepciona. La consideraba parte de la familia, lo apoyó con su hija y labores de la casa tras la muerte de su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante resultó ser su hermana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edith denuncia que su esposo comete incesto porque le es infiel con su propia hermana, Jennifer. Él alega que ella está enferma y los celos la hacen imaginar cosas que no suceden.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: José, el enano; Problema de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lourdes está casada con José, ella le exige que acepte su discapacidad, pero él se niega porque se siente sano y fuerte. Dos niñas se enfrentan por unos "tickets" para ir a Euro Disney en París.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aire mortal; El emú y la esmeralda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ernesto sufre las consecuencias de tener un vecino obsesionado con las armas. Además, Lily exige que un emú sea operado porque se tragó la esmeralda que estaba en su anillo de matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Que te Vaya Bonito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel Fernández es un cantante y compositor, también un alcohólico rehabilitado, se casa con Torcasa, pero le es infiel con Lupita. Cuando su esposa se entera, se suicida y la amante lo deja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El hijo del pueblo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un taxista se enamora de una periodista de televisión y sufre de angustia cuando la mujer no responde a sus galanteos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Radio de la frontera; Calientes, pero quietos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Valentina y Juan tienen un programa radial sin audiencia, cuando él cambia el enfoque pone en peligro a los inmigrantes indocumentados. Los maniquíes semidesnudos de Cairo molestan a su vecina.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La línea azul; Alegre despertar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos hermanos no se soportan y sus padres no saben cómo resolverlo. Sufre de una rara enfermedad, toma bebidas energéticas para no quedarse dormido, ahora no puede conciliar el sueño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El despertar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mauricio está enamorado de Carmen, pero su hijo se opone a esa relación. Jaime, quien se dedica a robar a escondidas de su madre, tendrá que despertar y pagar sus errores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres: El valor de ser madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika enfrenta el suicidio de su hijo adolescente con mucha fortaleza y sobre todo durante una fecha tan especial para todas las madres. Hoy recibe terapia para encarar una trágica pérdida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Omegaverse; Todo por un like
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yasyky y su novio Yokymata viven su vida como si estuvieran dentro de una historia del universo Manga, el "Omegaverse". Como se sienten incomprendidos por la sociedad de E. UU. quieren irse a vivir a Japón, donde están más familiarizados con esta cultura, pero para ello necesitan la autorización de la madre del chico porque está incapacitado mentalmente. Mauricio quiere que su esposa deje las redes sociales porque están afectando su vida matrimonial, pero ella no puede despegarse de su teléfono.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me desfiguró el rostro; Drogas en la mascota
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Angélica demanda a Linda por daños al salir de su spa con cuatro cejas y quemaduras. Cher acusa a Jonathan de drogar a su mascota, un lémur, que se puso agresiva y le sacó un ojo a la dueña.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No puedo vivir sin ti
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Ana Laura y Carlos firman el divorcio, el juez le otorga a ella la custodia de su hija Yolanda. Poco después, el acosador que la persiguió por años reaparece, pero ya no se trata del mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuando el amor es verdadero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eladio trae a su sobrina Mercedes a su casa, lo que molesta a su esposa y a su hija Beatriz. Ellas desprecian la relación de Mercedes con el panadero, pero cuando el amor es verdadero supera todas las barreras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La gran victoria de Gavino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El Capo mueve todas sus fichas y logra su cometido. Empieza su plan de venganza para liquidar a cada uno de sus enemigos y acorralar a Circe. No dejará que nadie escape. Diego busca a Gavino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Planes ambiciosos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mario y Eduardo buscan dinero en efectivo para invertir en estudios y en un negocio. Los hermanos Miguel y Ricardo deciden ir por un auto, pero una falla en la comunicación podría afectarlos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: También soy su padre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jesús quiere la custodia compartida de su hija, la cual perdió porque Sandra, la madre, lo denunció por abuso sexual contra la niña. Él asegura que ella actuó por venganza tras una infidelidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 36 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Desde el Estadio Tottenham Hotspur. Los Spurs buscan coger impulso tras su reciente victoria por 2-1 contra el Villa, que les ha sacado de la zona de descenso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La culpa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rita busca enmendar un enorme peso en su conciencia: confesar a una amiga que fue amante de su esposo y culpable de la muerte de su pequeño hijo, pero quizás no encuentre oídos que la escuchen.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy rata y a mucha honra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriela asegura que lo único que toma del negocio donde trabaja es el plato de comida para su familia. La hija del dueño llegó hace un mes y detecta abusos tras cuatro años de servicio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó el derecho a tener hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosalba autoriza una cirugía para impedir que su hija, menor de edad, quede embarazada por tercera vez. Alega que su nuero no se responsabiliza por sus dos hijas y ahora quiere un varón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerte de bebé; Los intocables
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La bebé de Isaak y Paula murió mientras dormía, ella lo culpa porque cuando era niño lo acusaron de asesinato. Demandan a pareja gay que llamó a la policía para denunciar supuesto acto sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé ancla; Bronca de strippers
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Judith fue deportada y deja a su hija, busca recuperarla porque su madre adoptiva tiene un cibercafé porno. Dos strippers pelean mientras le bailaban a un cliente y una resulta lesionada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi media hermana es la amante de mi marido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras ofrecerle trabajo en el negocio, Hilda acusa a Eugenia, su media hermana, de convertirse en la amante de José, su esposo. Además, responsabiliza a ambos del quiebre de la tienda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nuevos aliados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe comienza a sentir la ira de su padre. Él hace todo lo posible para dejarla sin aliados. Ramona delata cuál es la ruta de escape de Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El último show; Haz de mí lo que quieras
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una acróbata muere durante una fiesta, su hermana demanda a la abuela del niño que causó la tragedia. Verónica ayuda a Alfonso con su sobrepeso, él no sabe que sus fotos están en Internet.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Deportivo - Leganés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: RC Deportivo buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: CD Leganés intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Sporting - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Real Sporting buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: AD Ceuta FC intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Huesca
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Real Racing Club buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría. SD Huesca intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Deportivo
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Cádiz necesita un partido de mínimos: bloque compacto, control emocional y precisión en los centros para vivir cerca del área rival sin desordenarse. El Dépor, instalado en la zona alta, buscará mandar con ritmo y amplitud; si convierte su dominio en remates claros y gana la batalla de segundas jugadas, puede inclinar un duelo exigente en las áreas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Ceuta - Castellón
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Murube sube el voltaje: Ceuta intenso en duelos, muy competitivo cuando roba y directo para cargar el segundo palo. El Castellón quiere continuidad con balón y llegada por fuera para sostener su ambición en la zona alta; si controla la pérdida y domina el balón parado, tendrá ventaja en un choque de mucha fricción.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Burgos - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Plantío aprieta: Burgos fiable en marcadores cortos, con oficio para vivir de centros, segundas jugadas y estrategia. El Almería, en clave de zona alta, buscará ritmo por dentro y mucha presencia en área; si equilibra la pospérdida, su pegada puede decidir un partido de márgenes mínimos.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Post Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Burgos - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Valladolid - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Zorrilla invita a mandar desde banda y centros tensos; el Valladolid querrá continuidad con balón para sumar sin conceder transiciones. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y gestión de áreas; si compite el balón parado y reduce errores, puede rascar puntos que mueven la aguja en la zona baja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda empuja: Málaga de amplitud, centros medidos y presión tras pérdida para instalarse en campo rival. El Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar cuando encuentre salida; si controla el ritmo y acierta en la primera llegada, puede convertir el duelo en una noche de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Albacete - Cultural
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Alba pretende pausa y claridad entre líneas para encontrar remate frontal y evitar que el partido se rompa. La Cultural llega obligada a sumar: orden, ayudas constantes y transiciones verticales; si consigue sostener su área y competir rechaces, puede convertirlo en un duelo de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Ceuta - Castellón
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Murube sube el voltaje: Ceuta intenso en duelos, muy competitivo cuando roba y directo para cargar el segundo palo. El Castellón quiere continuidad con balón y llegada por fuera para sostener su ambición en la zona alta; si controla la pérdida y domina el balón parado, tendrá ventaja en un choque de mucha fricción.

El Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar cuando encuentre salida; si controla el ritmo y acierta en la primera llegada, puede convertir el duelo en una noche de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Valladolid - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Zorrilla invita a mandar desde banda y centros tensos; el Valladolid querrá continuidad con balón para sumar sin conceder transiciones. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y gestión de áreas; si compite el balón parado y reduce errores, puede rascar puntos que mueven la aguja en la zona baja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Andorra quiere gobernar desde la posesión larga y los pasillos interiores, buscando paciencia y continuidad para abrir líneas. Las Palmas intentará alternar fases de control con ataques más directos; si protege su espalda y afina el último pase, tiene argumentos para competir por puntos de zona alta.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Leganés - Racing
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Butarque suele pedir partido serio: el Lega tratará de cerrar espacios, defender su área y castigar en estrategia y segundas jugadas. El Racing, referencia en la zona alta, buscará llevar el partido a campo rival con presión y ritmo; si gana la batalla de rechaces y centros laterales, puede abrir brecha.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral para atacar con ritmo controlado y llegada desde segunda línea. El Granada intentará imponer pegada y dominio de áreas; si se hace fuerte en el balón parado y ajusta su repliegue, puede decantar un choque que suele ir a marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Mirandés - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Anduva favorece partidos con tensión: Mirandés intenso tras robo, profundo por banda y con mucha intención en segundas jugadas. El Eibar querrá ritmo y continuidad para mirar hacia la zona alta; si controla transiciones y es contundente en el área, tiene ventaja en un duelo de ida y vuelta.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral para atacar con ritmo controlado y llegada desde segunda línea. El Granada intentará imponer pegada y dominio de áreas; si se hace fuerte en el balón parado y ajusta su repliegue, puede decantar un choque que suele ir a marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Albacete - Cultural
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Alba pretende pausa y claridad entre líneas para encontrar remate frontal y evitar que el partido se rompa. La Cultural llega obligada a sumar: orden, ayudas constantes y transiciones verticales; si consigue sostener su área y competir rechaces, puede convertirlo en un duelo de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Andorra quiere gobernar desde la posesión larga y los pasillos interiores, buscando paciencia y continuidad para abrir líneas. Las Palmas intentará alternar fases de control con ataques más directos; si protege su espalda y afina el último pase, tiene argumentos para competir por puntos de zona alta.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Burgos - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Plantío aprieta: Burgos fiable en marcadores cortos, con oficio para vivir de centros, segundas jugadas y estrategia. El Almería, en clave de zona alta, buscará ritmo por dentro y mucha presencia en área; si equilibra la pospérdida, su pegada puede decidir un partido de márgenes mínimos.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Huesca - Real Sociedad B
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Alcoraz pide oficio: Huesca de bloque compacto, duelos y mucha atención a la espalda para no conceder. La Real B buscará equilibrio con balón y orden sin él; si evita pérdidas peligrosas y compite la estrategia, puede convertirlo en un partido largo y muy táctico.

A former title challenger and veteran presence in the Top 15, Burns is a world-class grappler with UFC wins over Demian Maia, Tyron Woodley, Stephen “Wonderboy” Thompson, and Jorge Masvidal.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 11
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When the Octagon returns to Montreal for the first time since 2015, fans are treated to a stacked card headlined by a championship doubleheader. In the main event, Belal Muhammad defends his welterweight crown for the first time against Australian powerhouse Jack Della Maddalena, and Manon Fiorot battles to be the first female French champion against Flyweight phenom Valentina Shevchenko. Plus, the return of Jose Aldo and much more on UFC Reloaded.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) AFL Premiership Season - Round 9 - Richmond v Adelaide Crows
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1004: Teixeira vs. Prochazka
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 275 featured Czech MMA star Jiri Prochazka in his third Octagon outing as he sought UFC gold against newly minted light heavyweight champion, Glover Teixeira. Relive their fight with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 11
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1005: Usman vs. Edwards 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 278 was headlined by a rematch between long reigning middleweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and UFC vet Leon “Rocky” Edwards. See their fight like never before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.
